rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Elec. Code §253.159, which governs campaign contribution limit exceptions for relatives of candidates or officeholders.
quote: Section 253.155 does not apply to an individual who is related to the candidate or officeholder within the second degree by consanguinity
_note: No overlap between tax homestead exemption policy and election contribution law.
